nodes.text: Address? Seven twenty-two Elm Park Drive. It's four blocks from the school, which my colleagues think is convenient and I think is why I can never stop thinking about work.
No. I've been there six years. I keep saying I'll move somewhere I can't see the school roof from my kitchen window, but rent is what it is.
Thank you. I'm going to get the ibuprofen and then I'm going home and I am not grading anything tonight. That's a lie, I'm going to grade things. But I'm going to feel bad about it.
